race.comment: MAXILDO (8) has been rock-solid this campaign and only needs to hold his form to be right there again. Loves this trip and gets in light with the 2kg claimer sticking. CAPULET (5) returns short of a preferred trip but boasts good peaks and has jumped out sharply in readiness to suggest she can fire fresh. Inside draw another bonus. CANNY DEFENSE (2) capitalised on the back of two encouraging efforts last start when sneaking up the inside here. Can keep the ball rolling. CALYPSO KING (4) has mixed his form since resuming but his bold front-running effort second-up lines up well for this. Will prove tough to run down if left alone early. CROWN MINT (7) has a sharp turn of foot on his day and will be hoping the pace is genuine.
